message:
chore(artifacts): update verification evidence across sections 10.4-10.15 and 13

Refreshes verification_evidence.json and verification_summary.md
files across multiple sections:

- section_10_4: 5 beads (bd-12q, bd-1ah, bd-1gx, bd-1vm, bd-phf, bd-273, bd-ml1)
- section_10_5: 2 beads (bd-2yc, bd-sh3)
- section_10_6: 1 bead (bd-2pw)
- section_10_12: 1 bead (bd-2aj)
- section_10_13: 29 beads — bulk re-verification pass
- section_10_14: 2 beads (bd-2573, bd-nupr)
- section_10_15: 1 bead (bd-tyr2) + ambient_authority_findings.json
- section_13: 1 bead (bd-34d5)
- section 15: migration cohort validation log + summary

These reflect the latest automated verification runs confirming
that each bead's implementation matches its specification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
